## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Type of Change
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/workflow update
- [ ] Bug fix

## Validation
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/validate-skills.sh`
- [ ] Verified required files exist
- [ ] Verified `SKILL.md` required sections
- [ ] Added/updated examples where relevant

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows repository structure and naming
- [ ] Includes clear guardrails and limitations
- [ ] Keeps changes focused and minimal
